LanguageData.BioferritePlate.label: ultracite plate
LanguageData.BioferritePlate.description: Heavy plate flooring made from smoothed ultracite. While unattractive and slightly flammable, it is easy to clean and improves nearby containment equipment.
LanguageData.Voidmetal.label: dark metal
LanguageData.Voidmetal.description: This slick, dark surface is disorienting to look at. The near-featureless metal seems to shift in the light, but it remains cold and hard to the touch.
